title: My experience with interview at flipkart
subtitle: A personal review of the software engineering interview process and technical rounds
description: A walkthrough of my interview experience at Flipkart. I discuss the technical problem-solving rounds, system design questions, and the key preparation strategies that helped me navigate the process.

title: My experience with interview at Trademarkia
subtitle: Inside the developer hiring process at a major trademark search platform
description: A detailed look at my interview rounds at Trademarkia. Focuses on NLP topic modeling questions, vector database design, and real-time FastAPI integration challenges.

title: Journey in quant
subtitle: Reflections on mathematical modeling, quant finance challenges, and alpha generation
description: My personal path into quantitative finance and alpha modeling. I share the key mathematical concepts, coding exercises, and competition strategies that shaped my understanding of the quant landscape.
